mainQuestContent.title: Foundation of Bold Intimacy

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Connection is already open. The test is not interrupting it.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: You approach, but do not fully enter.
questBrief.mission: Your quest is to open the first real point of contact instead of waiting until vulnerability feels completely safe.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Where are you waiting for certainty before letting connection begin?
questBrief.livePrompt: Notice the moment you almost enter, then choose one honest step.

fieldBriefing.collapsedPreview: The doorway is right where you stop.
fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest starts at the threshold between wanting closeness and risking being seen. The work is not to force intimacy. It is to notice where the first honest move is being delayed by the need to feel fully secure first.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Caution held too long becomes a wall. One honest step before certainty is how trust actually begins.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You get close enough to feel it, but stop right before you are seen.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Notice the moment you almost enter, then choose one honest step.

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: The trap is turning preparation into protection, then calling the distance wisdom.
frictionSignals: You rehearse the conversation instead of beginning it.
You wait for proof that openness will be safe.
You test the edge but do not cross it.
You retreat right before contact becomes real.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Where are you over-preparing instead of beginning?

groundingProtocol: place one hand on the chest
say one true sentence without adding defense
groundingEffect.somaticShift: From braced anticipation into steadier emotional contact.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Where does your body tighten when connection gets close?

unlockCondition.questKey: Speak one true sentence → do not secure the outcome → let contact begin
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: You still feel nervous, but less split.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Before retreating, say: One honest step is enough.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: The first step does not need to guarantee the whole bond.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: What is the smallest true thing you could say right now?

mainQuestContent.driftPattern: You keep intimacy at the edge: close enough to imagine, not close enough to risk.

mainQuestContent.title: Natural Expression of Transformative Connection

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Connection is already open. The test is not interrupting it.

questBrief.mission: Your quest is to let natural connection become real enough to change the space between people.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Where does connection open easily, then quietly stop before it becomes meaningful?

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest is about the natural pull that appears before you try to manage it. You can create openings without force, but the growth happens when you stay present after the connection starts to matter.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Naturalness is powerful, but only when it is allowed to become real. Ease that protects itself is just a softer form of distance.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You let it get close, but not close enough to matter.

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: The trap is using natural ease to avoid conscious responsibility for the bond.
frictionSignals: You act casual when the connection matters.
You let chemistry happen but avoid the next honest step.
You keep things open enough to stay safe.
You downplay the pull before anyone can name it.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Where are you hiding inside what comes easily?

groundingProtocol: let one direct response remain unpolished
groundingEffect.somaticShift: From effortless opening into conscious emotional availability.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Where does your body soften first, then quietly step back?

unlockCondition.questKey: Let the pull be real → do not make it casual → allow connection to change something
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: You feel open without needing to dilute the connection.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Ask: Am I letting this matter?
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Naturalness becomes powerful when you stop hiding inside it.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: What would shift if you let this connection ask something of you?

mainQuestContent.driftPattern: Connection opens by itself, then you reduce its weight before it can ask anything real of you.

mainQuestContent.title: Experimentation in Playful Bonding

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Connection forms, then slips before it settles.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: Connection forms, then slips before it settles.
questBrief.mission: Your quest is to use playfulness as the doorway into real connection, not as a replacement for it.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Where are you keeping the vibe alive so the tenderness does not have to land?
questBrief.livePrompt: Let one playful opening become one honest follow-up.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest learns intimacy through contact, testing, mistakes, sparks, and repair. The gift is making closeness feel easier to enter. The lesson is staying present once the warmth has opened the room.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Play is the bridge, not the destination. Staying after the warmth is what makes connection real.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You make a joke right when the truth gets close.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Let one playful opening become one honest follow-up.

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: The trap is keeping connection active so it never has to become still.
frictionSignals: You charm the moment but avoid the follow-through.
You collect interactions instead of deepening one thread.
You move on once the bond asks for consistency.
You confuse spark with arrival.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Where are you keeping things lively to avoid settling?

groundingProtocol: add one sincere sentence before changing the subject
groundingEffect.somaticShift: From restless brightness into warm grounded contact.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Where does your body want to move when the room gets emotionally still?

unlockCondition.questKey: Use lightness to open → do not hide inside stimulation → deepen one real thread
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: Your warmth feels available instead of performative.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: After joking, ask: What almost got said?
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Play is the bridge, not the bond itself.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: What sincere thing could follow this light moment?

mainQuestContent.driftPattern: You open connection with warmth, then break the settling point before it can become dependable.

mainQuestContent.title: Relational Network of Trusted Openness

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Connection moves through trust, access, and belonging.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: Connection moves through trust, access, and belonging.
questBrief.mission: Your quest is to create spaces where people can become real without losing clarity, boundaries, or directness.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Where does staying socially connected help you avoid being personally known?
questBrief.livePrompt: Notice where belonging is replacing direct contact.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest makes intimacy relational. It moves through friendship, group trust, shared spaces, and consistent access. The work is to let connection become a clean channel for truth, not a comfortable field where the deeper thing stays protected.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Belonging that avoids truth is just warmth without contact. The bond deepens when access is honest.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You keep it social enough to avoid being truly known.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Notice where belonging is replacing direct contact.

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: The trap is using friendliness, loyalty, or inclusion to soften the risk of direct intimacy.
frictionSignals: You make room for everyone but hide the personal truth.
You prioritize harmony over the honest conversation.
You stay in familiar dynamics after they stop being clean.
You offer access before checking your boundary.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Where are you using the group to avoid one direct conversation?

groundingProtocol: name one boundary before extending more energy
groundingEffect.somaticShift: From porous openness into warm containment.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Does this connection feel mutual, clear, and spacious?

unlockCondition.questKey: Use relationship as the channel → do not hide in the circle → let trust carry truth
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: You feel open-hearted without feeling absorbed.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Before opening more, ask: Is this connection clean?
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Belonging becomes stronger when access is honest.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: What boundary would make this connection more real?

mainQuestContent.driftPattern: You build a warm relational field, then let the field protect you from the one direct truth that would deepen it.

mainQuestContent.title: Projected Influence of Unifying Magnetism

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: Others feel the pull before they know you.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: Others feel the pull before they know you.
questBrief.mission: Your quest is to use relational magnetism to create genuine unity without becoming trapped in projection.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Where are you being wanted for a role instead of met as a person?
questBrief.livePrompt: Notice where influence appears before honesty.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest works through influence. Others may sense your ability to dissolve tension, create unity, or make connection happen. The mastery is using that magnetism cleanly, without turning intimacy into performance or control.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Projection amplifies your presence but can replace real contact. Sincerity is what makes influence trustworthy.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You become more charming when you feel less certain inside.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Notice where influence appears before honesty.

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: The trap is letting projected desire turn connection into image management.
frictionSignals: You perform connection instead of entering it.
You accept the role because it gives leverage.
You mistake admiration for trust.
You unify people around your presence instead of shared truth.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Where are you performing rather than connecting?

groundingEffect.collapsedPreview: From projected pressure to clean authority.
groundingProtocol: say the clarifying truth before adding warmth
groundingEffect.somaticShift: From projected pressure into clean relational authority.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Am I connecting, persuading, or managing how I am seen?

unlockCondition.questKey: Clarify the shared truth → do not become the projected role → unify through sincerity
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: Your presence feels influential without becoming inflated.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Before influencing, ask: What is actually true here?
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Your magnetism is cleanest when it serves trust.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: What would you say if you were not trying to land the room?

mainQuestContent.driftPattern: You feel what the room wants, become it for a moment, then lose contact with the real bond underneath.

mainQuestContent.title: Mature Freedom of Non-Possessive Intimacy

hero.atmosphericSubtitle: You observe the bond before entering it.

questBrief.collapsedPreview: You observe the bond before entering it.
questBrief.mission: Your quest is to prove that intimacy can stay real without becoming ownership, pressure, or escape.
questBrief.fieldPrompt: Where does your need for freedom need more honesty?
questBrief.livePrompt: Notice whether spaciousness keeps you present or lets you disappear.

fieldBriefing.whatThisQuestIsAbout: This quest matures intimacy beyond possession. You are here to understand that connection can be spacious and still sincere. The test is whether freedom keeps you honest inside the bond, or quietly removes you from it.
fieldBriefing.whyThisMattersNow: Non-possession is not non-participation. Freedom that avoids ordinary presence is still a form of withdrawal.
fieldBriefing.primaryRecognitionTrigger: You call it freedom when part of you is already leaving.
fieldBriefing.livePrompt: Notice whether spaciousness keeps you present or lets you disappear.

assetsAndFriction.questTrap: The trap is turning freedom into a refined exit strategy.
frictionSignals: You resist definition even when clarity would be kind.
You stay open-ended so nothing can ask too much.
You detach when intimacy becomes ordinary.
You prefer possibility over participation.
assetsAndFriction.livePrompt: Where is freedom protecting you from showing up?

groundingProtocol: name what is true without promising what is not
groundingEffect.somaticShift: From floating detachment into spacious presence.
groundingEffect.bodyCheckPrompt: Is this freedom creating truth, or avoiding contact?

unlockCondition.questKey: Let the bond breathe → do not disappear into freedom → stay honest in contact
unlockCondition.embodiedSignal: You feel spacious and present at the same time.
unlockCondition.ritualPrompt: Say: I can be free and still be here.
unlockCondition.alignmentReminder: Non-possession is not the same as non-participation.
unlockCondition.livePrompt: What would staying look like without giving yourself away?

mainQuestContent.driftPattern: You make intimacy feel elevated while avoiding the ordinary consistency that lets someone trust your presence.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Foundation of Bold Intimacy.

nodes.name: First Contact
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to initiate honest connection through bold intimacy.
nodes.effect: Recognizes the threshold where fear blocks honest entry.
nodes.developmentCue: Find the smallest real doorway into connection.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can begin without needing certainty.

nodes.name: Hesitation Scan
nodes.description: Develops the awareness to detect when caution becomes avoidance.
nodes.effect: Detects when caution becomes avoidance.
nodes.developmentCue: Watch the sentence you almost say.
nodes.masteryMarker: You notice withdrawal before it becomes silence.

nodes.name: Chest Gate
nodes.description: Builds embodied capacity to stay present at the threshold of contact.
nodes.effect: Uses breath and body contact to soften guarded entry.
nodes.masteryMarker: Your body can stay present while nervous.

nodes.name: Sincere Opening
nodes.description: Creates trust by initiating with grounded emotional truth.
nodes.effect: Creates trust by initiating with grounded emotional truth.
nodes.masteryMarker: Others feel invited, not pressured.

nodes.name: Courageous Bond
nodes.description: Turns vulnerability into a stable beginning for intimacy.
nodes.effect: Turns vulnerability into a stable beginning for intimacy.
nodes.developmentCue: Let courage make the first bridge.
nodes.masteryMarker: Connection starts where fear once stopped you.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Natural Expression of Transformative Connection.

nodes.name: Effortless Pull
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to let natural connection become transformative.
nodes.effect: Recognizes the natural opening that appears before effort.
nodes.developmentCue: Let the connection register before managing it.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can feel the pull without reducing it.

nodes.name: Distance Flicker
nodes.description: Develops awareness to detect the moment ease becomes subtle withdrawal.
nodes.effect: Detects the moment ease becomes subtle withdrawal.
nodes.masteryMarker: You catch the retreat while the bond is still open.

nodes.name: Natural Contact
nodes.description: Builds embodied capacity to stay soft when connection starts to matter.
nodes.effect: Lets the body stay soft when connection starts to matter.
nodes.masteryMarker: Your presence stays simple and reachable.

nodes.name: Growth Bridge
nodes.description: Turns natural intimacy into shared development.
nodes.effect: Turns natural intimacy into shared development.
nodes.developmentCue: Stay with the opening you created.
nodes.masteryMarker: The bond changes the field without force.

nodes.name: Conscious Intimacy
nodes.description: Owns the gift of connection instead of waiting for it to be named.
nodes.effect: Owns the gift of connection instead of waiting for it to be named.
nodes.masteryMarker: Connection becomes transformative because you stay present.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Experimentation in Playful Bonding.

nodes.name: Warm Entry
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to use play as a doorway into real connection.
nodes.effect: Recognizes play as an opening into connection.
nodes.masteryMarker: People relax into contact around you.

nodes.name: Spark Loop
nodes.description: Develops awareness to detect when stimulation replaces intimacy.
nodes.effect: Detects when stimulation replaces intimacy.
nodes.developmentCue: Notice when the vibe avoids tenderness.
nodes.masteryMarker: You know when excitement is becoming escape.

nodes.name: Still Warmth
nodes.description: Builds embodied capacity to stay present after social energy rises.
nodes.effect: Keeps the body present after social energy rises.
nodes.developmentCue: Feel your feet after the laugh.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can stay warm without speeding up.

nodes.name: Honest Follow-Up
nodes.description: Converts playful openings into sincere relational threads.
nodes.effect: Converts playful openings into sincere relational threads.
nodes.developmentCue: Add truth after the playful moment.
nodes.masteryMarker: Lightness becomes a doorway to depth.

nodes.name: Joyful Depth
nodes.description: Makes connection feel safe, alive, and real through grounded play.
nodes.effect: Makes connection feel safe, alive, and real.
nodes.masteryMarker: Your joy creates intimacy, not distraction.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Relational Network of Trusted Openness.

nodes.name: Open Circle
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to build intimacy through trust and belonging.
nodes.effect: Recognizes the gift for creating belonging through trust.
nodes.masteryMarker: People feel welcomed without pressure.

nodes.name: Social Shield
nodes.description: Develops awareness to detect when belonging protects the deeper truth.
nodes.effect: Detects when belonging protects the deeper truth.
nodes.developmentCue: Notice where the group keeps you hidden.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can tell social warmth from direct intimacy.

nodes.name: Warm Boundary
nodes.description: Builds embodied capacity to pair heart availability with containment.
nodes.effect: Pairs heart availability with physical containment.
nodes.developmentCue: Feel the ribs before extending energy.
nodes.masteryMarker: You remain open without leaking.

nodes.name: Trust Channel
nodes.description: Builds shared spaces where closeness can carry truth.
nodes.effect: Builds shared spaces where closeness can carry truth.
nodes.masteryMarker: Belonging grows inside clean agreements.

nodes.name: Safe Belonging
nodes.description: Creates intimacy that is welcoming, mutual, and boundaried.
nodes.effect: Creates intimacy that is welcoming, mutual, and boundaried.
nodes.developmentCue: Let trust and limits grow together.
nodes.masteryMarker: Connection feels warm, clear, and sustainable.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Projected Influence of Unifying Magnetism.

nodes.name: Magnetic Contact
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to use relational magnetism to create genuine unity.
nodes.effect: Recognizes the power to gather people through connection.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can feel influence without becoming it.

nodes.name: Projection Mirror
nodes.description: Develops awareness to detect when others assign a role before knowing you.
nodes.effect: Detects when others assign a role before knowing you.
nodes.masteryMarker: You separate sincerity from performance.

nodes.name: Clean Authority
nodes.description: Grounds influence through breath, belly, and truth.
nodes.effect: Grounds influence through breath, belly, and truth.
nodes.masteryMarker: Your presence feels steady, not inflated.

nodes.name: Unity Signal
nodes.description: Uses relational leadership to align people around shared trust.
nodes.effect: Uses relational leadership to align people around shared trust.
nodes.masteryMarker: The field coheres around truth, not image.

nodes.name: Sincere Influence
nodes.description: Turns projected magnetism into practical relational service.
nodes.effect: Turns projected magnetism into practical relational service.
nodes.developmentCue: Use influence to dissolve barriers cleanly.
nodes.masteryMarker: People feel united, not managed.

perkTrees.subtitle: Develop the capacities behind Mature Freedom of Non-Possessive Intimacy.

nodes.name: Open Bond
nodes.description: This path develops the ability to hold intimacy with freedom and sincere presence.
nodes.effect: Recognizes intimacy that does not require possession.
nodes.masteryMarker: Closeness feels spacious and real.

nodes.name: Freedom Check
nodes.description: Develops awareness to detect when openness becomes avoidance.
nodes.effect: Detects when openness becomes avoidance.
nodes.developmentCue: Question the urge to stay undefined.
nodes.masteryMarker: You know when freedom is escape.

nodes.name: Present Space
nodes.description: Grounds spaciousness through posture, breath, and back-body awareness.
nodes.effect: Grounds spaciousness through posture, breath, and back-body awareness.
nodes.masteryMarker: You can be spacious without leaving.

nodes.name: Honest Flexibility
nodes.description: Creates evolving bonds through clarity instead of control.
nodes.effect: Creates evolving bonds through clarity instead of control.
nodes.masteryMarker: Others trust your freedom because it is honest.

nodes.name: Non-Possessive Depth
nodes.description: Holds intimacy with maturity, freedom, and sincere presence.
nodes.effect: Holds intimacy with maturity, freedom, and sincere presence.
nodes.developmentCue: Stay connected without owning the bond.
nodes.masteryMarker: Love remains real without becoming a cage.
